title: MIKASA Chalk Rectangle White Porcelain Serving Platter, White Glossy Rectangular Plate, Ideal for Buffets, Appetisers, Desserts, Party Food, Dishwasher Safe, 33cm
features: PERFECT FOR SHARING: At 33 x 22cm, this white serving platter is perfect for any occasion such as parties or buffets.
ELEGANT PRESENTATION: Crafted from high quality super white porcelain with glossy glazed finish, ensuring durability and refined style.
RECTANGULAR SHAPE: Perfect for serving appetisers, desserts, or afternoon tea favourites.
EASY CLEAN: Once you're done you can clean easily with the platter being dishwasher safe, making it a great addition to your dinnerware collection and suitable for daily use.
GIFT BOX: A thoughtful gift for hosts, food enthusiasts, or home entertainers, elegantly presented in a beautiful, high-quality gift box.
COMPLETE THE COLLECTION: Explore other beautiful Mikasa Chalk products including plates and bowls.
description: Celebrating the beauty in simplicity, the Mikasa Chalk Rectangle Serving Platter is perfect for everyday dining use and stylish entertaining with its clean and contemporary aesthetic. Crafted from durable, high-quality super white porcelain, this large serving plate features raised edges and a sleek rectangular shape that brings a contemporary edge to your dinner table or buffet spread. This versatile serving dish is perfect for appetisers, desserts, cheese boards, antipasti, afternoon tea, and more. The classic white finish beautifully highlights the colours of your food, making it a perfect canvas for food presentation at home or during special occasions. It's also dishwasher safe, so will look good as new after each and every use. Includes a 10-year guarantee. The Mikasa Chalk collection is lauded for its versatility, discover the larger 26cm serving platter and entire range for coordinating dinner plates, pasta bowls, serving bowls and more.
